entrypoints.description: Starts the local SOCKS5 agent and triggers the Telegram connect flow.
Prints the tg://socks deep link without opening Telegram.

prerequisites: Telegram Desktop installed with tg:// protocol handler registered
notes: This packaging path is self-contained and does not require user-installed Node.js.
Control plane is HTTPS remote config only.
Data plane is direct outbound TCP in the current MVP.
